# OhMyDesk

> OhMyDesk is coworking desk booking and management software for space operators. It provides a visual calendar for desk availability, revenue tracking, waiting lists, meeting room scheduling, and member management. Runs in the browser — no install required.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://ohmydesk.app/)
- [Features](https://ohmydesk.app/features)
- [Pricing](https://ohmydesk.app/pricing)
- [Compare](https://ohmydesk.app/compare) — vs Cobot, OfficeRnD, Nexudus, Spacebring, Archie

## Product
- **Type**: B2B SaaS, web application
- **Category**: Coworking space management software
- **Pricing**: 3-month free trial (no credit card), then from $18/month (Pro plan)
- **Setup**: Under 2 minutes
- **Multi-location**: Supported on the Multi-Location plan ($50/month)

## What it does
OhMyDesk helps coworking space operators manage desk bookings through a visual weekly/monthly calendar. Key capabilities:

- Assign desks to members or mark them available/booked
- Track revenue and expenses per space
- Manage flex day-pass plans for drop-in members
- Accept public bookings from walk-in clients via a branded booking page
- Send booking confirmations via Telegram and email
- Manage waiting lists for fully-booked desks
- Schedule meeting rooms by the hour
- Operate multiple locations from a single account
- Role-based access (owner, admin, member) — revenue visible to owners only

## Pricing summary
- **Free Trial**: $0/month for 3 months, every feature unlocked, no card required
- **Pro**: $18/month (early-bird, was $29) — single location, all features
- **Multi-Location**: $50/month — unlimited locations, shared member directory

## Contact
- Website: https://ohmydesk.app
- Email: hello@ohmydesk.app
